---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new signal, adapter, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What dataset or workflow is this for? Concrete
context (real/teleop vs simulation, which source format) helps a lot.

## Proposed solution

What would you like RoboCurate to do? If you're proposing a new quality signal, note
what it scores and what it's based on (a paper, a heuristic, prior art).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one seems better.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, sketches, or related issues.
